displayTitle: Match the Technique, Log the Blind Spots

beats.narration: Same physics, every job. What changes: access, geometry, and the flaw you're hunting. Technique selection is where a Level two earns the title.

payload.title: PICK THE TECHNIQUE
payload.sub: The Level II toolbox, reviewed with selection in mind.

beats.narration: Pulse echo reads depth from echo time. Through transmission reads energy loss, no depth. Pitch catch: send and receive split, same side.

payload.heading: Three ways to use a beam
payload.note: ECHO TIME = DEPTH · LOSS, NO DEPTH · SAME SIDE

beats.narration: Match the probe to the zone. Near surface pitting: dual element. Thin or hot sections: delay line. Welds: angle beam, meeting bevel flaws square on.

payload.heading: Match the probe to the zone

beats.narration: Every advantage buys a blind spot. Straight beam: dead zone. Angle beam: blocked skips. Through transmission: no depth. Surface waves: surface only.

payload.heading: Every advantage buys a blind spot

beats.narration: Write the technique into the report, and its blind spots beside it. That's the difference between scanning a part and evaluating one.

payload.sub: Document what the technique could not see.
